name: Glutinous Rice with Mangoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the glutinous rice in cold water for 2 hours. Drain thoroughly.
2. Line a steamer with cheesecloth and place it in the steamer pot. Heat the steamer and lay the rice on the cheesecloth.
3. Steam until cooked through (30 minutes), which will make the rice glossy.
4. In a large bowl, mix together the seasoning ingredients: coconut cream, sugar, and salt. Gently fold in the hot steamed rice. Cover tightly and let it absorb the flavors for 30 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, blend the sauce ingredients (coconut cream, sugar, and salt) in a pot until heated through, reaching boiling point, then allow to cool.
6. Peel and slice the mangoes lengthwise, removing the pits.
7. Divide the rice among six plates. Arrange mango slices on top and cover with the sauce.
8. Sprinkle sesame seeds over each serving and serve immediately.
